**Summary:** All three emails are found in `UsersController.scala`, embedded directly in what appears to be a hardcoded list of `User` objects (likely test/seed data). The affected lines are:

```scala
User(1, "Alice",   "alice@example.com",   LocalDateTime.of(2024, 1, 15, 10, 30)),
User(2, "Bob",     "bob@example.com",     LocalDateTime.of(2024, 2, 20, 14,  0)),
User(3, "Charlie", "charlie@example.com", LocalDateTime.of(2024, 3,  5,  9, 15)),
```

**Recommendation:** These hardcoded users should be moved out of source code and into a database seed file, environment configuration, or a proper test fixture — so that real user data is never committed to version control.
